name: Fingerprint Grow → Enroll
description: Starts the fingerprint enrollment process on the slot number defined.

config_entries.label: Finger ID
config_entries.description: The slot number to enroll the new fingerprint into. Limited to the fingerprint capacity available on the reader.

config_entries.label: Num Scans
config_entries.description: Number of times to scan the finger to be enrolled. Limited to the number of character buffers available on the reader. Defaults to 2.
